_meta.description: Submit a prompt to Grok and capture the response.

prompt.description: The prompt/question to send to Grok
prompt.hint: Can be any length. For multi-line, use newlines in the string.

_meta.notes: Grok uses Tiptap/ProseMirror contenteditable (not textarea). Use Input.insertText via CDP. Submit button: button[aria-label='Submit'] — stable. Response selector needs calibration after first run.

params.prompt: Say hello in exactly one sentence.

prompt_input.description: Tiptap/ProseMirror contenteditable — confirmed on fresh Grok page

chain.note: ProseMirror contenteditable: Input.insertText + Enter key. submit:true fires Enter.
Fixed 30s wait for generation. TODO: replace with wait_for once stop-button selector confirmed.
Confirmed 2026-04-06: [class*='markdown']:last-of-type captures Grok's answer (skips thinking preamble)
